eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Douglas, WA; at 1:54 AM on JUL 4, 2026 Effective until 3:54 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Douglas County SHERIFF has issued a LEVEL 3 fire WARNING near Orondo. Box Canyon Rd You are advised to evacuate immediately.  Road and Evacuation routes can become blocked; if you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. For updates check Local Radio, TV or for additional information go to Douglas County Sheriff Facebook. Red Cross Shelter will be available at the Community Gym at 310 E. Johnson Ave in Chelan. If you are in the area evacuate now. If you are not in the area, stay away. Red Cross Shelter will be available at the Community Gym at 310 E. Johnson Ave in Chelan.
